questionHtml: Suggest, based on the Michaelis–Menten plot, how a competitive inhibitor such as ethanol reduces the toxicity of methanol.
markschemeHtml:
Km is higher /same Vmax reached at higher [substrate]    [✔]

slower reaction rate
OR
gives time to excrete/eliminate methanol    [✔]

meta.title: Suggest, based on the Michaelis–Menten plot, how a competitive inhibitor such as ethanol reduces the toxicity of methanol.
